description: Centered, single-subject SDXL teacher prompts for small image model distillation.
default_negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, caption, low quality, blurry, noisy, distorted, deformed, cluttered background, multiple subjects, cropped subject, extra limbs

variants.prompt: {subject}, centered subject, single subject, simple clean background, readable silhouette, clean illustration{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark
{subject} front view, centered subject, single subject, plain background, clear simple shape, clean illustration{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark
{subject} side view, centered subject, single subject, plain background, readable silhouette, toy-like 3D render{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark
{subject} object, centered subject, single subject only, blank background, bold silhouette, clean low detail illustration{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark
{subject} as a simple toy object, centered subject, single subject, simple clean background, chunky readable shape, toy-like 3D render{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark
{subject}, icon-like composition, centered, full object visible, single subject, plain light background, readable at small size{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark
{subject}, simple cartoon style, centered subject, full object visible, uncluttered background, strong silhouette{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark
{subject}, clean vector-like illustration, centered single subject, plain background, full object visible, low detail readable shape{guard_clause}, no text, no logo, no watermark

presets.title: Apple
presets.subject: red apple fruit with stem and leaf
presets.guard: fruit only, no apple logo shape, no bite mark, no repeating pattern

presets.title: Car
presets.subject: small toy car vehicle
presets.guard: vehicle only, no people, no driver, no buildings, no street scene
